target.title: ci: add deadcode check
target.body: ## Summary¥n- add a CI deadcode analyzer step matching the telecrawl sweep pattern¥n- remove unreachable helpers reported by deadcode where tests confirmed the deletion was safe¥n¥n## Validation¥n- `git diff --check`¥n- `deadcode -test ./...` or the repo-equivalent CI command¥n- `GOWORK=off go test -count=1 ./...`¥n- `GOWORK=off go build ./cmd/photoscrawl`¥n¥nNote: `autoreview` was requested but no `autoreview`/`ai-autoreview`/`git-autoreview` executable was available on PATH in this shell.
